title: F3 Everywhere
description: A very simple mod to let you use F3+? keybinds anywhere, including in menus.
body:
# F3 Everywhere

This mod lets you use all vanilla F3+<insert key here> shortcuts in any game menu, not just in the world. This is most primarily useful for resource pack creators, who can now use F3+T to reload resources without having to close a menu.

![Yup, it works](https://github.com/enjarai/f3-anywhere/raw/master/img/yup_it_works.png)

Because of how tiny this mod is, it should™ work on any Minecraft version, future and present, that is newer than 1.12.
